login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your personal space
login.register: Not registered yet... Create an account

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Enter your information to create your personal space

name.label: Username
name.minlength: Username must be at least 2 characters

password.label: Password
password.minlength: Password must be at least 8 characters

register.login: Already have an account? Sign in

loading.title: Verifying...
loading.subtitle: Please wait while we verify your email address.

success.title: Email confirmed!
success.subtitle: Your email address has been successfully verified.
success.redirect: Redirecting to login in {{ seconds }} second(s)...

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.description:
An email has been sent to you. Click the link to verify your email address.
If you didn't receive it, click "Resend verification email" and remember to check your spam folder.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address to receive a reset link

success.title: Email sent
success.subtitle: If an account exists with this email, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.

password.label: New password
password.minlength: Password must be at least 8 characters

success.title: Password reset!
success.subtitle: Your password has been successfully changed.
success.redirect: Redirecting to login in {{ seconds }} second(s)...

password.matches: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one number and one special character
password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

name.minLength: Username must be at least 2 characters

register.conflict: An account already exists with this email

login.email_not_verified: Please verify your email before signing in

refresh.invalid_token: Session expired, please sign in again
refresh.token_revoked: Session revoked, please sign in again

email.resend_sent: A new verification email has been sent to your address.

forgot_password.sent: If an account exists with this email, a link has been sent

user.has_roles: Cannot delete: user has assigned roles

role.already_assigned: This role is already assigned to this user
role.not_assigned: This role is not assigned to this user

role.already_exists: A role with this name already exists
role.has_users: Cannot delete: users have this role

permission.not_assigned: This permission is not assigned to this role

throttle.too_many_requests: Too many requests. Please try again in {{ retryAfter }}.

api.unknown: An error occurred, please try again later

unauthorized.title: 401 – Unauthorized
unauthorized.description: Your session has expired or you are not authenticated yet. Please sign in to access this page.

notFound.title: 404 – Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

workInProgress.title: Work in progress
workInProgress.description: This section is under development and will be available soon.
